---
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
    css: adit/custom.css
site: workflowr::wflow_site
---

<div style="text-align: left;">
  <img src="assets/logo/DRSN_logo_smaller.png" alt="Image" style="width: 2in; float: left; margin-right: 10px;">
  <div style="overflow: hidden; padding-top: 8%;">

## **Xenium Analysis Pipeline**    
<br>
<hr>
</div> </div>
<br>

## 

This page documents the progress of the pipeline for 10x Genomics Xenium <i>in-situ</i> transcriptomics data. It covers the full workflow from raw Xenium Ranger output through to differential expression and spatial analysis. Each module defines its inputs, outputs, and key decision points. A dictionary section covers steps that require contextual reasoning rather than fixed execution.


```{=html}
<style>
.pipeline-outer { margin-left: 0; padding-left: 0; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
.pipeline-wrap { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; margin: 1.5rem 0; width: 100%; }
.pipeline-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #555; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; }
.pipeline-title:hover { color: #111; text-decoration: underline; }
.pipeline-flow { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-start; }
.pipe-start { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding-top: 14px; }
.pipe-start svg { width: 46px; height: 46px; opacity: 0.6; }
.pipe-start span { font-size: 14px; color: #888; }
.pipe-arrow { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 35px; color: #ccc; }
.pipe-arrow svg { width: 40px; height: 24px; }
.pipe-node { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; width: 161px; transition: transform 0.15s; }
.pipe-node:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }
.pipe-node:hover .pipe-box { border-color: #666; }
.pipe-box { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; background: #f9f9f9; width: 144px; height: 115px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.pipe-box img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.pipe-placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.pipe-placeholder svg { width: 40px; height: 40px; opacity: 0.18; }
.pipe-label { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; max-width: 161px; color: #222; }
.pipe-sub-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
.pipe-sub-line { width: 1px; height: 20px; background: #ddd; }
.pipe-sub-box { border: 1px dashed #ccc; border-radius: 10px; background: #fff; width: 130px; padding: 7px 6px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; }
.pipe-sub-box:hover { border-color: #888; }
.pipe-sub-tag { font-size: 11px; color: #aaa; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 6px; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.pipe-sub-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #666; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; }
.pipe-skip-arc { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; overflow: visible; justify-content: flex-start; }
</style>

<script>
var FOLDER = '<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M4 12C4 10.3 5.3 9 7 9H16L19 13H33C34.7 13 36 14.3 36 16V30C36 31.7 34.7 33 33 33H7C5.3 33 4 31.7 4 30V12Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>';
var ARROW  = '<svg viewBox="0 0 28 16" fill="none"><line x1="2" y1="8" x2="22" y2="8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><polyline points="15,3 24,8 15,13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
var PLACEHOLDER = '<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><rect x="4" y="4" width="32" height="32" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="14" cy="15" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><polyline points="4,28 13,19 20,26 26,20 36,30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';

function renderPipeline(config) {
  var wrap = document.getElementById(config.id);
  if (!wrap) return;

  var titleEl = wrap.querySelector('.pipeline-title');
  if (titleEl) { titleEl.textContent = config.title; titleEl.href = config.titleHref || '#'; }

  var skips = [];
  config.steps.forEach(function(s, i) {
    if (s.skipTo !== undefined) skips.push({ from: i, to: s.skipTo });
  });

  var arcRow = wrap.querySelector('.pipe-skip-arc');
  if (arcRow && skips.length > 0) {
    var stepW = 161 + 40;
    var startOffset = 58;
    var svgW = startOffset + (config.steps.length * stepW) + 20;
    var svgH = 32;
    var paths = skips.map(function(sk) {
      var x1 = startOffset + sk.from * stepW + 80;
      var x2 = startOffset + sk.to  * stepW + 80;
      var r  = 10;
      return '<path d="M' + x1 + ' ' + svgH + ' L' + x1 + ' ' + r + ' Q' + x1 + ' 0 ' + (x1+r) + ' 0 L' + (x2-r) + ' 0 Q' + x2 + ' 0 ' + x2 + ' ' + r + ' L' + x2 + ' ' + svgH + '" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#skip-arrow-' + config.id + ')"/>';
    }).join('');
    arcRow.innerHTML = '<svg width="' + svgW + '" height="' + svgH + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + svgW + ' ' + svgH + '" overflow="visible"><defs><marker id="skip-arrow-' + config.id + '" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></marker></defs>' + paths + '</svg>';
  }

  var flowEl = wrap.querySelector('.pipeline-flow');
  var html = '<div class="pipe-start">' + FOLDER + '<span>Data</span></div>';

  config.steps.forEach(function(s) {
    html += '<div class="pipe-arrow">' + ARROW + '</div>';

    var nodeInner = '<div class="pipe-box">' +
      (s.img ? '<img src="' + s.img + '" alt="' + s.label + '">' : '<div class="pipe-placeholder">' + PLACEHOLDER + '</div>') +
      '</div><span class="pipe-label">' + s.label + '</span>';

    if (s.sub) {
      html += '<div class="pipe-sub-col">';
      html += '<a class="pipe-node" href="' + (s.href || '#') + '">' + nodeInner + '</a>';
      html += '<div class="pipe-sub-line"></div>';
      html += '<a class="pipe-sub-box" href="' + (s.sub.href || '#') + '">';
      if (s.sub.tag) html += '<span class="pipe-sub-tag">' + s.sub.tag + '</span>';
      html += '<span class="pipe-sub-label">' + s.sub.label + '</span></a>';
      html += '</div>';
    } else {
      html += '<a class="pipe-node" href="' + (s.href || '#') + '">' + nodeInner + '</a>';
    }
  });

  flowEl.innerHTML = html;
}
</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>
var Xenium = {
  id:        "pipeline-xenium",
  title:     "Xenium spatial pipeline",
  titleHref: "xenium-index.html",
  steps: [
    { label: "Cell segmentation", 
      img: "assets/index-ims/segment.png", 
      href: "xenium-segmentation.html"},
    { label: "Data processing",   
      img: "assets/index-ims/analysis.png", 
      href: "xenium-processing.html",
    },
    { label: "Spatial analysis",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/spatial.png", 
      href: "xenium-spatial.html" },
  ]
};

var Visium = {
  id:        "pipeline-visium",
  title:     "Visium spatial pipeline",
  titleHref: "xenium.html",
  steps: [
    { label: "Cell segmentation", img: "", href: "segmentation.html" , skipTo: 2},
    { label: "Data processing",   img: "", href: "processing.html",
      skipTo: 2,
      sub: { label: "Alt. segmentation", tag: "optional", href: "alt-seg.html" }
    },
    { label: "Spatial analysis",  img: "", href: "spatial.html" },
  ]
};
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-xenium">
  <a class="pipeline-title" href="#"></a>
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(Xenium);</script>
```

## Technology Readiness Levels

```{r trl-table, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=F}
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

trl <- data.frame(
  TRL = 7:0,
  Description = c(
    "Pipeline is Scientific Platforms compatible",
    "Old data run through whole pipeline; details documented and pipeline revisited",
    "Integrate into a FAIR framework",
    "Revised pipeline validated on 2-3 old or new datasets",
    "Old data run through whole pipeline; details documented and pipeline revisited",
    "Pipeline designed and fully detailed; draft code per module developed",
    "Code repository available; broad pipeline described",
    "No established code base"
  ),
  Actions = c(
    "Independently deployable on 3 new projects; training and education materials developed; pipeline handed off; core facility ready; cost-recovery metadata collected",
    "Reproduce known biological results on benchmark/public dataset; marker gene or cell type recovery meets defined threshold",
    "Reproducible report designed; balances efficient outputs with interpretability; meets expectations for data sharing and transparency",
    "Predict and document failure points (predictability is a feature, not a bug); communications developed for user-facing handoff",
    "Use available data; run through pipeline; identify and document failure points; inform pipeline design changes; code instructions developed",
    "Complete first draft overview pipeline with detailed pages; describe touch points and input/output; Brian approved; modules developed, functioned and documented",
    "Document reference material in repository; design overview pipeline visualisation",
    "Find existing repositories or create repository; establish a codebase"
  ),
  Status = c("⬜",
             "⬜",
             "⬜",
             "⬜",
             "⬜",
             "⬜",
             "🔄",
             "✅")
)
trl <- trl[nrow(trl):1, ]

kable(trl, col.names = c("TRL", "Description", "Actions", "Status"),
      align = c("c", "l", "l", "c"), row.names = F) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE,
                font_size = 13) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "3em", bold = TRUE) %>%
  column_spec(2, width = "20em") %>%
  column_spec(3, width = "30em") %>%
  column_spec(4, width = "3em") %>%
  row_spec(which(trl$Status == "📍"), background = "#fff9e6")
```

## Toolbox

**Functions**:  
- Image-Prep for `cellpose` segmentation from a directory of Xenium outs folders (not documented; n=1; python). [pageX]()  
- Rapid regeneration of Seurat Object from custom mask (not documented; n=1; R/python). [pageX]() 

**Workflows**:  
- Data-informed merging of custom cell segmentation (not documented; n=1; R/python). [pageX]() 

<!---Change Log--->

<details><summary>**Change Log:**</summary>

<hr>

<div class = "hint-goals">  
**2026-03-30** Reference data to download  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE312420  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE312415  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE284742  
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE307895 PMID: 41252205
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE300147
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE270678 VISIUM
</div>


<hr>

<div class = "hint-goals">  
**2026-03-25** Update (but not organised)  
I currently have  
a) python function for Xenium-specific image preparations for cellpose segmentation.  
b) python script for pulling transcript data and generating a new `.mtx`, `barcodes.tsv` and `features.tsv` from a custom segmentation.  
c) have a workflow for data-informed custom merge segmentation.  
**Need to now document these and ingest those into this repo**...  
Next, need to have a custom-into-Seurat vs XeniumRanger-into-Seurat workflow. Working on this now.   
</div>

<hr>

<div class = "hint-goals">  
**2026-03-18** Xenium Pipeline page created.  
First update!  
</div>

</details>
<br>
